text:
MANILA, Philippines  – As the 2024 Olympics came to a close in Paris, the story that dominated Philippine headlines was the double-gold feat by gymnastCarlos Yulo– a first in the history of Philippine sports. BoxersNesthy PetecioandAira Villegasalso won bronze in their respective events, bringing the country’s medal haul to a total of four.

But of course, there is so much more to the Games.

The 2024 edition of the Summer Olympics was also the Philippines’100th yearof participation, and was considered the country’sbest performancein the Games.

In this panel discussion, Rappler multimedia reporter JR Isaga sits down with sports editor Jasmine Payo, multimedia reporter Delfin Dioquino, and head of digital communications Kaye Cabal to talk about the highlights of the Paris Olympics and what comes next for Filipino Olympians. They also give a sneak peek of how the Rappler team covered the Olympics — from dealing with time zones to covering events remotely.

Bookmark this page to catch the panel discussion on Friday, August 16, at 5 pm.– Rappler.com

How does this make you feel?

follow us
title: WATCH: Panel discussion on the 2024 Paris Olympics, what's next for Team Philippines
author: Jaira Roxas
description: Tune in to this panel discussion with the team from Rappler's coverage of the Paris Olympics
